packs.name: specfactory
packs.description: Complete specfactory workflow: clarify, specify, plan, tasks, analyze, implement, blindqa, spec-critique, checklist, code-review, tasks-to-issues.

packs.name: ios
packs.description: iOS development workflow: build and verify on simulator.

pipelines.name: specify
pipelines.description: Create or update the feature specification from a natural language description.

pipelines.name: plan
pipelines.description: Execute the implementation planning workflow to generate design artifacts.

pipelines.name: tasks
pipelines.description: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md from design artifacts.

pipelines.name: analyze
pipelines.description: Perform cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec, plan, and tasks.

pipelines.name: implement
pipelines.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing all tasks defined in tasks.md.

pipelines.name: blindqa
pipelines.description: Blind QA verification against the spec with deterministic signal emission.

pipelines.name: spec-critique
pipelines.description: Adversarial specification analysis to find gaps and ambiguities before implementation.

pipelines.name: checklist
pipelines.description: Generate a custom checklist for the current feature based on user requirements.

pipelines.name: code-review
pipelines.description: Structured code review against spec and implementation standards.

pipelines.name: tasks-to-issues
pipelines.description: Convert tasks.md into actionable, dependency-ordered GitHub issues.

pipelines.name: ios-build
pipelines.description: Compile and install the iOS app on simulator, emit BUILD_COMPLETE or BUILD_FAILED signal.

pipelines.name: ios-verify
pipelines.description: Navigate iOS simulator to verify spec criteria, emit VERIFY_PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED/QUESTION signal.
